token_family_docs.$description: Reduced-saturation emphasis for interactive elements in passive layout zones — headers, footers, and sidebars where actions should not draw attention away from primary content. Colors appear near-neutral while remaining interactive. Do: Use for navigation links, header and footer actions, and any interactive element in a zone where monochromatic appearance is preferred over a visible call-to-action color. Avoid: Do not use as the default for primary form actions or submission buttons — those require High emphasis to communicate their role clearly.
